name: Blueprint Anatomy
description: Explanatory breakdown of a Decantr blueprint contract. Shows sections, routes, features, patterns, guard rules, and generated context as a coherent system rather than a flat JSON file.

explainer.description: Two-region anatomy layout: narrative component list on the left and a compact contract or context preview on the right.

slots.anatomy-list: Stack of contract parts with icon, title, and one-sentence purpose.
slots.contract-preview: Code or structured preview focused on the selected part.
slots.part-badges: Small badges for route, section, feature, guard, pack, or pattern.
slots.explanation: Short prose that connects the part to generated AI context.

visual_brief: A contract explanation surface that makes Decantr feel like an intelligent system. It should turn blueprint JSON into a readable mental model: routes, sections, patterns, guard rules, and generated context. The UI should be polished and educational but still operational, with code previews kept tight and legible.

responsive.mobile: Single-column anatomy list followed by previews. Accordions are acceptable to prevent long scroll walls.
responsive.tablet: Single-column or two-column if the preview remains readable.
responsive.desktop: Two-region layout with sticky or persistent preview when helpful.

layout_hints.mental_model: Explain relationships, not just fields. The user should understand how a blueprint feeds context, health, and implementation.
layout_hints.preview_size: Code previews should be cropped or focused. Avoid dumping an entire essence file into this pattern.
layout_hints.part_order: Recommended order: purpose, sections, routes, patterns, features, guard rules, generated packs.

motion.micro: Selecting an anatomy part can update the preview with a subtle cross-fade.
motion.transitions: Avoid complex animation in code regions; legibility wins.

keyboard: Selectable anatomy parts should be reachable in logical order and update the preview without losing focus.
announcements: Preview changes should expose the selected anatomy part name.
accessibility.focus_management: If using tabs or accordions, preserve standard keyboard behavior.
